        "role_brief_outputs": role_outputs,
        "group_digest_outputs": digest_outputs,
        "chief_dashboard_outputs": dashboard_outputs,
        "chief_card_outputs": chief_card_outputs,
        "chief_broadcast_outputs": chief_broadcast_outputs,
        "control_tower_outputs": control_tower_outputs,
        "control_tower_broadcast_outputs": control_tower_broadcast_outputs,
        "control_tower_card_outputs": control_tower_card_outputs,
        "review_ledger_outputs": review_ledger_outputs,
        "control_tower_snapshot": {
            "morning_news_status": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("morning_news", {}).get("status"),
            "morning_news_last_success_at": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("morning_news", {}).get("last_success_at"),
            "morning_news_ok": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("morning_news", {}).get("health_ok"),
            "morning_news_status_reason": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("morning_news", {}).get("status_reason"),
            "strategy_audit_status": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("strategy_audit", {}).get("overall_status"),
            "strategy_audit_ok": (
                (control_tower_payload or {}).get("strategy_audit", {}).get("overall_status") == "PASS"
                and bool((control_tower_payload or {}).get("strategy_audit", {}).get("robust_pass"))
            ),
            "strategy_audit_annual_return_pct": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("strategy_audit", {}).get("annual_return_pct"),
            "strategy_audit_max_drawdown_pct": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("strategy_audit", {}).get("max_drawdown_pct"),
            "strategy_audit_sharpe": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("strategy_audit", {}).get("sharpe"),
            "backtest_queue_status": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("backtest_queue", {}).get("status"),
            "backtest_queue_running_count": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("backtest_queue", {}).get("running_count"),
            "stable_strategy_visible": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("backtest_queue", {}).get("stable_strategy_visible"),
            "ths_market_status": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("health_probe", {}).get("ths_market", {}).get("status"),
            "ths_market_summary": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("health_probe", {}).get("ths_market", {}).get("summary"),
            "ths_market_fallback_count": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("health_probe", {}).get("ths_market", {}).get("fallback_count"),
            "ths_market_failed_count": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("health_probe", {}).get("ths_market", {}).get("failed_count"),
            "paper_date_tag": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("paper_execution", {}).get("date_tag"),
            "paper_freshness_status": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("paper_execution", {}).get("freshness", {}).get("status"),
            "paper_freshness_summary": (control_tower_payload or {}).get("paper_execution", {}).get("freshness", {}).get("summary"),
        },
    }
    summary_path = REPORT_DIR / f"investment_research_publish_bundle_{meeting_type}_{now:%Y%m%d}.json"
    atomic_write_json(summary_path, summary, encoding="utf-8", ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

    delivery_push = None
    if DELIVERY_PUSH.exists():
        delivery_push = run_optional([sys.executable, str(DELIVERY_PUSH), "--meeting-type", meeting_type], cwd=WORKSPACE)
        summary["delivery_push"] = delivery_push
        atomic_write_json(summary_path, summary, encoding="utf-8", ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

    for item in data_source_health_outputs:
        print(item)
    for item in event_watch_outputs:
        print(item)
    for item in temporary_meeting_outputs:
        print(item)
    for item in orchestrator_outputs:
        print(item)
    for item in role_outputs:
        print(item)
    for item in digest_outputs:
        print(item)
    for item in dashboard_outputs:
        print(item)
    for item in chief_card_outputs:
        print(item)
    for item in chief_broadcast_outputs:
        print(item)
    for item in control_tower_outputs:
        print(item)
    for item in control_tower_broadcast_outputs:
        print(item)
    for item in control_tower_card_outputs:
        print(item)
    for item in review_ledger_outputs:
        print(item)
    if delivery_push:
        for item in delivery_push.get("stdout", []):
            print(item)
    print(summary_path)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

🦞 OpenClaw 2026.3.28 (f9b1079) — Gateway online—please keep hands, feet, and appendages inside the shell at all times.

Usage: openclaw cron edit [options] <id>

Edit a cron job (patch fields)

Arguments:
  id                                   Job id

Options:
  --account <id>                       Channel account id for delivery
                                       (multi-account setups)
  --agent <id>                         Set agent id
  --announce                           Announce summary to a chat
                                       (subagent-style)
  --at <when>                          Set one-shot time (ISO) or duration like
                                       20m
  --best-effort-deliver                Do not fail job if delivery fails
  --channel <channel>                  Delivery channel (last)
  --clear-agent                        Unset agent and use default (default:
                                       false)
  --clear-session-key                  Unset session key (default: false)
  --cron <expr>                        Set cron expression
  --delete-after-run                   Delete one-shot job after it succeeds
                                       (default: false)
  --deliver                            Deprecated (use --announce). Announces a
                                       summary to a chat.
  --description <text>                 Set description
  --disable                            Disable job (default: false)
  --enable                             Enable job (default: false)
  --every <duration>                   Set interval duration like 10m
  --exact                              Disable cron staggering (set stagger to
                                       0)
  --expect-final                       Wait for final response (agent) (default:
                                       false)
  --failure-alert                      Enable failure alerts for this job
  --failure-alert-account-id <id>      Account ID for failure alert channel
                                       (multi-account setups)
  --failure-alert-after <n>            Alert after N consecutive job errors
  --failure-alert-channel <channel>    Failure alert channel (last)
  --failure-alert-cooldown <duration>  Minimum time between alerts (e.g. 1h,
                                       30m)
  --failure-alert-mode <mode>          Failure alert delivery mode (announce or
                                       webhook)
  --failure-alert-to <dest>            Failure alert destination
  -h, --help                           Display help for command
  --keep-after-run                     Keep one-shot job after it succeeds
                                       (default: false)
  --light-context                      Enable lightweight bootstrap context for
                                       agent jobs
  --message <text>                     Set agentTurn payload message
  --model <model>                      Model override for agent jobs
  --name <name>                        Set name
  --no-best-effort-deliver             Fail job when delivery fails
  --no-deliver                         Disable announce delivery
  --no-failure-alert                   Disable failure alerts for this job
  --no-light-context                   Disable lightweight bootstrap context for
                                       agent jobs
  --session <target>                   Session target (main|isolated)
  --session-key <key>                  Set session key for job routing
  --stagger <duration>                 Cron stagger window (e.g. 30s, 5m)
  --system-event <text>                Set systemEvent payload
  --thinking <level>                   Thinking level for agent jobs
                                       (off|minimal|low|medium|high|xhigh)
  --timeout <ms>                       Timeout in ms (default: "30000")
  --timeout-seconds <n>                Timeout seconds for agent jobs
  --to <dest>                          Delivery destination (E.164, Telegram
                                       chatId, or Discord channel/user)
  --token <token>                      Gateway token (if required)
  --tz <iana>                          Timezone for cron expressions (IANA)
  --url <url>                          Gateway WebSocket URL (defaults to
                                       gateway.remote.url when configured)
  --wake <mode>                        Wake mode (now|next-heartbeat)

Usage: openclaw cron add|create [options]

Add a cron job

Options:
  --account <id>         Channel account id for delivery (multi-account setups)
  --agent <id>           Agent id for this job
  --announce             Announce summary to a chat (subagent-style) (default:
                         false)
  --at <when>            Run once at time (ISO with offset, or +duration). Use
                         --tz for offset-less datetimes
  --best-effort-deliver  Do not fail the job if delivery fails (default: false)
  --channel <channel>    Delivery channel (last) (default: "last")
  --cron <expr>          Cron expression (5-field or 6-field with seconds)
  --delete-after-run     Delete one-shot job after it succeeds (default: false)
  --deliver              Deprecated (use --announce). Announces a summary to a
                         chat.
  --description <text>   Optional description
  --disabled             Create job disabled (default: false)
  --every <duration>     Run every duration (e.g. 10m, 1h)
  --exact                Disable cron staggering (set stagger to 0) (default:
                         false)
  --expect-final         Wait for final response (agent) (default: false)
  -h, --help             Display help for command
  --json                 Output JSON (default: false)
  --keep-after-run       Keep one-shot job after it succeeds (default: false)
  --light-context        Use lightweight bootstrap context for agent jobs
                         (default: false)
  --message <text>       Agent message payload
  --model <model>        Model override for agent jobs (provider/model or alias)
  --name <name>          Job name
  --no-deliver           Disable announce delivery and skip main-session summary
  --session <target>     Session target (main|isolated)
  --session-key <key>    Session key for job routing (e.g.
                         agent:my-agent:my-session)
  --stagger <duration>   Cron stagger window (e.g. 30s, 5m)
  --system-event <text>  System event payload (main session)
  --thinking <level>     Thinking level for agent jobs
                         (off|minimal|low|medium|high|xhigh)
  --timeout <ms>         Timeout in ms (default: "30000")
  --timeout-seconds <n>  Timeout seconds for agent jobs
  --to <dest>            Delivery destination (E.164, Telegram chatId, or
                         Discord channel/user)
  --token <token>        Gateway token (if required)
  --tz <iana>            Timezone for cron expressions (IANA) (default: "")
  --url <url>            Gateway WebSocket URL (defaults to gateway.remote.url
                         when configured)
  --wake <mode>          Wake mode (now|next-heartbeat) (default: "now")

PY

content.text:
if event_watch.get("should_temporary_meet"):
        lines.append("- 事件监控：已触发临时会商建议。")
    if trade_card.get("paper_date_tag") or paper_freshness:
        lines.append(
            f"- 模拟盘快照：{trade_card.get('paper_date_tag') or '-'}"
            f" | 新鲜度={cn_status(paper_freshness.get('status'))}"
        )
        if paper_freshness.get("summary"):
            lines.append(f"- 模拟盘说明：{paper_freshness.get('summary')}")
    if health_snapshot.get("status"):
        lines.append(
            f"- 数据源健康：{cn_status(health_snapshot.get('status'))}"
            f" | 推荐模式={cn_status(health_snapshot.get('recommended_mode'))}"
        )
    if ths:
        lines.append(
            f"- THS本地行情：{cn_status(ths.get('status'))}"
            f" | THS命中/回退/失败={ths.get('ok_count', 0)}/{ths.get('fallback_count', 0)}/{ths.get('failed_count', 0)}"
        )
        lines.append(f"- THS摘要：{ths.get('summary') or '-'}")
    if health_snapshot.get("observations"):
        lines.append(f"- 观察项：{'、'.join(cn_text(item) for item in health_snapshot.get('observations', [])[:2])}")
    return "\n".join(lines)


def dedupe_key(
    meeting_type: str,
    date_tag: str,
    target_name: str,
    target_value: str,
    message: str,
    card_payload: dict[str, Any] | None,
) -> str:
    base = {
        "meeting_type": meeting_type,
        "date_tag": date_tag,
        "target_name": target_name,
        "target_value": target_value,
        "message": message,
        "card": card_payload or {},
    }
    raw = json.dumps(base, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True)
    return hashlib.sha256(raw.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()


def send_payload(
    *,
    channel: str,
    account: str,
    target: str,
    message: str,
    card_payload: dict[str, Any] | None,
    dry_run: bool,
) -> tuple[bool, str]:
    cmd = [
        resolve_openclaw_bin(),
        "message",
        "send",
        "--channel",
        channel,
        "--account",
        account,
        "--target",
        target,
        "-m",
        message,
        "--json",
    ]
    if card_payload:
        cmd.extend(["--card", json.dumps(card_payload, ensure_ascii=False)])
    if dry_run:
        cmd.append("--dry-run")
    rc, out, err = run_cmd(cmd, timeout=180)
    info = (out.strip() or err.strip())[-4000:]
    return rc == 0, info


def main() -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Push investment research meeting summary to Feishu")
    parser.add_argument("--meeting-type", choices=["morning", "midday", "close", "night"], required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--date-tag", default=default_date_tag())
    parser.add_argument("--dry-run", action="store_true")
    parser.add_argument("--force", action="store_true")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    meeting_type = str(args.meeting_type)
    date_tag = str(args.date_tag)
    config = load_json(CONFIG_FILE)
    state = load_json(STATE_FILE)

    trade_card_path = REPORT_DIR / f"investment_research_trade_card_{meeting_type}_{date_tag}.json"
    chief_card_path = REPORT_DIR / f"investment_research_chief_card_{meeting_type}_{date_tag}.json"
    control_tower_card_path = REPORT_DIR / f"investment_research_control_tower_card_{date_tag}.json"
    control_tower_path = REPORT_DIR / f"investment_research_control_tower_{date_tag}.json"
    chief_broadcast_path = REPORT_DIR / f"investment_research_chief_broadcast_{meeting_type}_{date_tag}.md"
    group_digest_path = REPORT_DIR / f"investment_research_group_digest_{meeting_type}_{date_tag}.md"
    bundle_path = REPORT_DIR / f"investment_research_publish_bundle_{meeting_type}_{date_tag}.json"

    trade_card = load_json(trade_card_path)
    chief_card = load_json(chief_card_path)
    control_tower_card = load_json(control_tower_card_path)
    control_tower = load_json(control_tower_path)
    bundle = load_json(bundle_path)
    _chief_broadcast_text = read_text(chief_broadcast_path)
    _group_digest_text = read_text(group_digest_path)

    if not trade_card:
        raise SystemExit(f"missing trade card: {trade_card_path}")

    preferred_card = chief_card if chief_card else control_tower_card or None
    health_snapshot = resolve_health_snapshot(date_tag, bundle, control_tower)
    message = build_message(meeting_type, date_tag, trade_card, bundle, health_snapshot)

    deliveries: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    state_deliveries = state.get("deliveries", {}) if isinstance(state.get("deliveries"), dict) else {}

    for target_name, target_cfg in selected_targets(config):
        channel = str(target_cfg.get("channel") or "feishu")
        account = str(target_cfg.get("account") or "main")
        target = str(target_cfg.get("target") or "")
        if not target:
            deliveries.append(
                {
                    "target_name": target_name,
                    "status": "FAILED",
                    "reason": "missing_target",
                }
            )
            continue

        state_key = f"{date_tag}:{meeting_type}:{target_name}:{target}"
        current_dedupe = dedupe_key(meeting_type, date_tag, target_name, target, message, preferred_card)
        previous_dedupe = state_deliveries.get(state_key)
        if previous_dedupe == current_dedupe and not args.force:
            deliveries.append(
                {
                    "target_name": target_name,
                    "channel": channel,
                    "account": account,
                    "target": target,
                    "status": "SKIPPED",
                    "reason": "duplicate",
                    "dedupe_key": current_dedupe,
                }
            )
            continue

        ok, info = send_payload(
            channel=channel,
            account=account,
            target=target,
            message=message,
            card_payload=preferred_card,
            dry_run=args.dry_run,
        )
        deliveries.append(
            {
                "target_name": target_name,
                "channel": channel,
                "account": account,
                "target": target,
                "status": "OK" if ok else "FAILED",
                "dedupe_key": current_dedupe,
                "info": info,
                "dry_run": args.dry_run,
            }
        )
        if ok and not args.dry_run:
            state_deliveries[state_key] = current_dedupe

    state["deliveries"] = state_deliveries
    state["updated_at"] = now_str()
    if not args.dry_run:
        write_json(STATE_FILE, state)

    report_payload = {
        "generated_at": now_str(),
        "meeting_type": meeting_type,
        "date_tag": date_tag,
        "dry_run": args.dry_run,
        "force": args.force,
        "message": message,
        "source_files": {
            "trade_card": str(trade_card_path),
            "chief_card": str(chief_card_path) if chief_card_path.exists() else None,
            "control_tower_card": str(control_tower_card_path) if control_tower_card_path.exists() else None,
            "control_tower": str(control_tower_path) if control_tower_path.exists() else None,
            "chief_broadcast": str(chief_broadcast_path) if chief_broadcast_path.exists() else None,
            "group_digest": str(group_digest_path) if group_digest_path.exists() else None,
            "publish_bundle": str(bundle_path) if bundle_path.exists() else None,
        },
        "health_snapshot": health_snapshot,
        "deliveries": deliveries,
    }
    report_path = REPORT_DIR / f"investment_research_delivery_push_{meeting_type}_{date_tag}.json"
    write_json(report_path, report_payload)
    print(report_path)

    failed = [item for item in deliveries if item.get("status") == "FAILED"]
    return 1 if failed else 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())

def run_stock_watcher_summary() -> dict[str, Any]:
    if not STOCK_WATCHER_SUMMARY.exists():
        return {"ok": False, "reason": "stock_watcher_not_installed"}

    rc, out, err = run_cmd(["python3", str(STOCK_WATCHER_SUMMARY)], timeout=240)
    lines = [line for line in out.splitlines() if line.strip()]
    return {
        "ok": rc == 0 and len(lines) > 0,
        "returncode": rc,
        "command": ["python3", str(STOCK_WATCHER_SUMMARY)],
        "lines": lines[:120],
        "stderr_tail": safe_tail(err),
    }



def fetch_akshare_flow(code: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
    if not AKSHARE_STOCK_CLI.exists():
        return None
    rc, out, err = run_cmd(["python3", str(AKSHARE_STOCK_CLI), "flow", "--symbol", code], timeout=120)
    if rc != 0:
        return {
            "code": code,
            "error": safe_tail(err) or f"returncode={rc}",
        }
    try:
        rows = json.loads(out)
    except Exception:
        return {"code": code, "error": "invalid_json_response"}
    if not isinstance(rows, list) or not rows:
        return {"code": code, "error": "empty_flow_rows"}
    row = rows[0]
    return {
        "code": code,
        "date": row.get("日期"),
        "close": row.get("收盘价"),
        "pct": row.get("涨跌幅"),
        "main_inflow": row.get("主力净流入-净额"),
        "main_inflow_ratio": row.get("主力净流入-净占比"),
    }



def is_trading_day() -> bool:
    try:
        import akshare as ak  # type: ignore

        today = date.today().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
        df = ak.tool_trade_date_hist_sina()
        s = set(df["trade_date"].dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d").tolist())
        return today in s
    except Exception:
        return date.today().weekday() < 5



def push_to_feishu(target_user: str, message: str, image_file: str = "") -> tuple[bool, str]:
    cmd = [
        "openclaw",
        "message",
        "send",
        "--channel",
        "feishu",
        "--account",
        "default",
        "--target",
        target_user,
        "-m",
        message,
    ]
    if image_file and Path(image_file).exists():
        cmd.extend(["--media", image_file])

    rc, out, err = run_cmd(cmd, timeout=90)
    info = (out.strip() or err.strip())[-1000:]
    return rc == 0, info

    stock_daily = summary.get("stock_daily", {})

        f"- Invalid rows: **{input_info.get('invalid_row_count', 0)}**",
        "",
        "## Input Snapshots",
        f"- JSON: `{artifacts.get('input_snapshot_json', '-')}`",
        f"- CSV: `{artifacts.get('input_snapshot_csv', '-')}`",

        f"- Status: **{'OK' if stock_daily.get('ok') else 'FAILED'}**",
        f"- HTML: `{stock_daily.get('html_file') or '-'}`",
        f"- Image: `{stock_daily.get('image_file') or '-'}`",
    ]

def publish_artifacts(artifacts: RunArtifacts) -> None:
    shutil.copyfile(artifacts.report_md, artifacts.legacy_report_md)
    shutil.copyfile(artifacts.summary_json, artifacts.legacy_summary_json)
    shutil.copyfile(artifacts.report_md, artifacts.latest_report_md)
    shutil.copyfile(artifacts.summary_json, artifacts.latest_summary_json)
    shutil.copyfile(artifacts.run_summary_txt, artifacts.latest_run_summary_txt)
    shutil.copyfile(artifacts.input_snapshot_json, artifacts.latest_input_snapshot_json)
    shutil.copyfile(artifacts.input_snapshot_csv, artifacts.latest_input_snapshot_csv)



def make_run_id() -> str:
    return datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S_%f")



def main() -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Fuse stock-watcher + akshare-stock + stock-daily-report")
    source_group = parser.add_mutually_exclusive_group()
    source_group.add_argument("--codes", default="", help="Override codes, comma-separated")
    source_group.add_argument("--input-file", default="", help="Explicit input file: json/csv/xlsx/xls/txt")
    parser.add_argument("--limit", type=int, default=0, help="Limit number of A-share codes for fast testing")
    parser.add_argument("--output-dir", default=str(DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR))
    parser.add_argument("--report-prefix", default="a-share-fusion-report")
    parser.add_argument("--akshare-top", type=int, default=8)
    parser.add_argument("--push-feishu", action="store_true")
    parser.add_argument("--target-user", default="user:ou_968a615509dc191f04220e18cda67080")
    parser.add_argument("--trading-day-only", action="store_true")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    if args.trading_day_only and not is_trading_day():
        print(json.dumps({"status": "SKIP_NON_TRADING_DAY", "date": str(date.today())}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
        return

    output_dir = Path(args.output_dir).expanduser().resolve()
    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    run_id = make_run_id()
    artifacts = init_run_artifacts(output_dir, args.report_prefix, run_id)

    try:
        bundle = resolve_input_bundle(args, output_dir)
        write_input_snapshots(bundle, artifacts)

        sync_stock_daily_config(bundle.selected_a_share_codes, output_dir)
        sync_stock_watcher_watchlist(bundle.all_codes)

        stock_daily = run_stock_daily_report(bundle.selected_a_share_codes, output_dir, run_id)
        watcher = run_stock_watcher_summary()
        if not stock_daily.get("ok") and not watcher.get("ok"):
            raise FusionReportError(
                "all_report_engines_failed",
                "stock-daily-report 与 stock-watcher 同时失败，按 fail-closed 停止",
                details={
                    "stock_daily": stock_daily,
                    "stock_watcher": {
                        "ok": watcher.get("ok"),
                        "returncode": watcher.get("returncode"),
                        "stderr_tail": watcher.get("stderr_tail"),
                    },
                },
            )

        flow_rows: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        for code in bundle.selected_a_share_codes[: max(0, args.akshare_top)]:
            row = fetch_akshare_flow(code)
            if row:
                flow_rows.append(row)

        degraded_reasons: list[str] = []
        if not stock_daily.get("ok"):
            degraded_reasons.append("stock_daily_report_failed")
        if any(row.get("error") for row in flow_rows):
            degraded_reasons.append("partial_akshare_flow_failure")

        status = "SUCCESS" if not degraded_reasons else "SUCCESS_WITH_FALLBACK"
        summary = {
            "status": status,
            "generated_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
            "run_id": run_id,
            "output_dir": str(output_dir),
            "degraded_reasons": degraded_reasons,
            "input": {
                "source_kind": bundle.source_kind,
                "source_label": bundle.source_label,
                "source_file": bundle.source_file,
                "normalized_code_count": len(bundle.all_codes),
                "a_share_code_count": len(bundle.a_share_codes),
                "selected_a_share_code_count": len(bundle.selected_a_share_codes),
                "non_a_codes": bundle.non_a_codes,
                "invalid_row_count": len(bundle.invalid_rows),
                "all_codes": bundle.all_codes,
                "selected_a_share_codes": bundle.selected_a_share_codes,
            },
            "stock_daily": stock_daily,
            "stock_watcher": {
                "ok": watcher.get("ok", False),
                "returncode": watcher.get("returncode"),
                "lines": (watcher.get("lines") or [])[:20],
                "stderr_tail": watcher.get("stderr_tail"),
            },
            "akshare_flow_rows": flow_rows,
            "artifacts": {
                "run_dir": str(artifacts.run_dir),
                "input_snapshot_json": str(artifacts.input_snapshot_json),
                "input_snapshot_csv": str(artifacts.input_snapshot_csv),
                "report_md": str(artifacts.report_md),
                "summary_json": str(artifacts.summary_json),
                "run_summary_txt": str(artifacts.run_summary_txt),
                "legacy_report_md": str(artifacts.legacy_report_md),
                "legacy_summary_json": str(artifacts.legacy_summary_json),
                "latest_report_md": str(artifacts.latest_report_md),
                "latest_summary_json": str(artifacts.latest_summary_json),
                "latest_run_summary_txt": str(artifacts.latest_run_summary_txt),
                "latest_input_snapshot_json": str(artifacts.latest_input_snapshot_json),
                "latest_input_snapshot_csv": str(artifacts.latest_input_snapshot_csv),
            },
        }

        artifacts.report_md.write_text(build_markdown(summary), encoding="utf-8")
        artifacts.run_summary_txt.write_text(build_run_summary_text(summary), encoding="utf-8")
        artifacts.summary_json.write_text(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
        publish_artifacts(artifacts)

        if args.push_feishu:
            msg = (
                "📈 A股融合报告已生成\n"
                f"- 状态: {summary['status']}\n"
                f"- A股代码数: {len(bundle.selected_a_share_codes)}\n"
                f"- MD: {artifacts.report_md}\n"
                f"- Summary: {artifacts.summary_json}"
            )
            ok, info = push_to_feishu(
                target_user=args.target_user,
                message=msg,
                image_file=stock_daily.get("image_file", ""),
            )
            summary["feishu_push"] = {"ok": ok, "info": info}
            artifacts.summary_json.write_text(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
            publish_artifacts(artifacts)

        print(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    except FusionReportError as exc:
        failure = {
            "status": "FAILED_CLOSED",
            "generated_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
            "run_id": run_id,
            "output_dir": str(output_dir),
            "error": exc.to_payload(),
            "artifacts": {
                "run_dir": str(artifacts.run_dir),
                "summary_json": str(artifacts.summary_json),
                "run_summary_txt": str(artifacts.run_summary_txt),
            },
        }
        artifacts.summary_json.write_text(json.dumps(failure, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")

        f"- HTML: `{stock_daily.get('html_file') or '-'}`",

    ]
    return "\n".join(lines) + "\n"



def publish_artifacts(artifacts: RunArtifacts) -> None:
    shutil.copyfile(artifacts.report_md, artifacts.legacy_report_md)
    shutil.copyfile(artifacts.summary_json, artifacts.legacy_summary_json)
    shutil.copyfile(artifacts.report_md, artifacts.latest_report_md)
    shutil.copyfile(artifacts.summary_json, artifacts.latest_summary_json)
    shutil.copyfile(artifacts.run_summary_txt, artifacts.latest_run_summary_txt)
    shutil.copyfile(artifacts.input_snapshot_json, artifacts.latest_input_snapshot_json)
    shutil.copyfile(artifacts.input_snapshot_csv, artifacts.latest_input_snapshot_csv)



def make_run_id() -> str:
    return datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S_%f")



def main() -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Fuse stock-watcher + akshare-stock + stock-daily-report")
    source_group = parser.add_mutually_exclusive_group()
    source_group.add_argument("--codes", default="", help="Override codes, comma-separated")
    source_group.add_argument("--input-file", default="", help="Explicit input file: json/csv/xlsx/xls/txt")
    parser.add_argument("--limit", type=int, default=0, help="Limit number of A-share codes for fast testing")
    parser.add_argument("--output-dir", default=str(DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR))
    parser.add_argument("--report-prefix", default="a-share-fusion-report")
    parser.add_argument("--akshare-top", type=int, default=8)
    parser.add_argument("--push-feishu", action="store_true")
    parser.add_argument("--target-user", default="user:ou_968a615509dc191f04220e18cda67080")
    parser.add_argument("--trading-day-only", action="store_true")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    if args.trading_day_only and not is_trading_day():
        print(json.dumps({"status": "SKIP_NON_TRADING_DAY", "date": str(date.today())}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
        return

    output_dir = Path(args.output_dir).expanduser().resolve()
    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    run_id = make_run_id()
    artifacts = init_run_artifacts(output_dir, args.report_prefix, run_id)

    try:
        bundle = resolve_input_bundle(args, output_dir)
        write_input_snapshots(bundle, artifacts)

        sync_stock_daily_config(bundle.selected_a_share_codes, output_dir)
        sync_stock_watcher_watchlist(bundle.all_codes)

        stock_daily = run_stock_daily_report(bundle.selected_a_share_codes, output_dir, run_id)
        watcher = run_stock_watcher_summary()
        if not stock_daily.get("ok") and not watcher.get("ok"):
            raise FusionReportError(
                "all_report_engines_failed",
                "stock-daily-report 与 stock-watcher 同时失败，按 fail-closed 停止",
                details={
                    "stock_daily": stock_daily,
                    "stock_watcher": {
                        "ok": watcher.get("ok"),
                        "returncode": watcher.get("returncode"),
                        "stderr_tail": watcher.get("stderr_tail"),
                    },
                },
            )

        flow_rows: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
        for code in bundle.selected_a_share_codes[: max(0, args.akshare_top)]:
            row = fetch_akshare_flow(code)
            if row:
                flow_rows.append(row)

        degraded_reasons: list[str] = []
        if not stock_daily.get("ok"):
            degraded_reasons.append("stock_daily_report_failed")
        if any(row.get("error") for row in flow_rows):
            degraded_reasons.append("partial_akshare_flow_failure")

        status = "SUCCESS" if not degraded_reasons else "SUCCESS_WITH_FALLBACK"
        summary = {
            "status": status,
            "generated_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
            "run_id": run_id,
            "output_dir": str(output_dir),
            "degraded_reasons": degraded_reasons,
            "input": {
                "source_kind": bundle.source_kind,
                "source_label": bundle.source_label,
                "source_file": bundle.source_file,
                "normalized_code_count": len(bundle.all_codes),
                "a_share_code_count": len(bundle.a_share_codes),
                "selected_a_share_code_count": len(bundle.selected_a_share_codes),
                "non_a_codes": bundle.non_a_codes,
                "invalid_row_count": len(bundle.invalid_rows),
                "all_codes": bundle.all_codes,
                "selected_a_share_codes": bundle.selected_a_share_codes,
            },
            "stock_daily": stock_daily,
            "stock_watcher": {
                "ok": watcher.get("ok", False),
                "returncode": watcher.get("returncode"),
                "lines": (watcher.get("lines") or [])[:20],
                "stderr_tail": watcher.get("stderr_tail"),
            },
            "akshare_flow_rows": flow_rows,
            "artifacts": {
                "run_dir": str(artifacts.run_dir),
                "input_snapshot_json": str(artifacts.input_snapshot_json),
                "input_snapshot_csv": str(artifacts.input_snapshot_csv),
                "report_md": str(artifacts.report_md),
                "summary_json": str(artifacts.summary_json),
                "run_summary_txt": str(artifacts.run_summary_txt),
                "legacy_report_md": str(artifacts.legacy_report_md),
                "legacy_summary_json": str(artifacts.legacy_summary_json),
                "latest_report_md": str(artifacts.latest_report_md),
                "latest_summary_json": str(artifacts.latest_summary_json),
                "latest_run_summary_txt": str(artifacts.latest_run_summary_txt),
                "latest_input_snapshot_json": str(artifacts.latest_input_snapshot_json),
                "latest_input_snapshot_csv": str(artifacts.latest_input_snapshot_csv),
            },
        }

        artifacts.report_md.write_text(build_markdown(summary), encoding="utf-8")
        artifacts.run_summary_txt.write_text(build_run_summary_text(summary), encoding="utf-8")
        artifacts.summary_json.write_text(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
        publish_artifacts(artifacts)

        if args.push_feishu:
            msg = (
                "📈 A股融合报告已生成\n"
                f"- 状态: {summary['status']}\n"
                f"- A股代码数: {len(bundle.selected_a_share_codes)}\n"
                f"- MD: {artifacts.report_md}\n"
                f"- Summary: {artifacts.summary_json}"
            )
            ok, info = push_to_feishu(
                target_user=args.target_user,
                message=msg,
                image_file=stock_daily.get("image_file", ""),
            )
            summary["feishu_push"] = {"ok": ok, "info": info}
            artifacts.summary_json.write_text(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
            publish_artifacts(artifacts)

        print(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

            },
        }

class FusionReportError(RuntimeError):
    def __init__(
        self,
        code: str,
        message: str,
        *,
        details: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
        exit_code: int = 2,
    ) -> None:
        super().__init__(message)
        self.code = code
        self.message = message
        self.details = details or {}
        self.exit_code = exit_code

    def to_payload(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return {
            "code": self.code,
            "message": self.message,
            "details": self.details,
            "exit_code": self.exit_code,
        }

def normalize_code(raw: Any) -> str | None:
    s = str(raw or "").strip().upper()
    if not s or s in {"NAN", "NONE", "NULL"}:
        return None
    if len(s) >= 8 and s[:2] in {"SH", "SZ", "BJ", "HK"} and s[2:].isdigit():
        s = s[2:]
    if "." in s:
        s = s.split(".", 1)[0]
    s = re.sub(r"\D", "", s)
    if len(s) in {5, 6}:
        return s
    return None



def normalize_header(raw: Any) -> str:
    return re.sub(r"[\s_\-]+", "", str(raw or "")).strip().lower()



def classify_code(code: str | None) -> str:
    if not code:
        return "invalid"
    if len(code) == 6:
        return "a_share_6d"
    return "non_a_share_or_other"



def dedupe(items: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    seen = set()
    out: list[str] = []
    for item in items:
        if item in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(item)
        out.append(item)
    return out

def init_run_artifacts(output_dir: Path, report_prefix: str, run_id: str) -> RunArtifacts:
    run_dir = output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_runs" / run_id
    run_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    return RunArtifacts(
        run_id=run_id,
        run_dir=run_dir,
        input_snapshot_json=run_dir / "input_snapshot.json",
        input_snapshot_csv=run_dir / "input_snapshot.csv",
        report_md=run_dir / "report.md",
        summary_json=run_dir / "summary.json",
        run_summary_txt=run_dir / "run_summary.txt",
        legacy_report_md=output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_{run_id}.md",
        legacy_summary_json=output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_{run_id}.json",
        latest_report_md=output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_latest.md",
        latest_summary_json=output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_latest_summary.json",
        latest_run_summary_txt=output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_latest_run_summary.txt",
        latest_input_snapshot_json=output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_latest_input_snapshot.json",
        latest_input_snapshot_csv=output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_latest_input_snapshot.csv",
    )



def write_input_snapshots(bundle: InputBundle, artifacts: RunArtifacts) -> None:
    selected_set = set(bundle.selected_a_share_codes)
    snapshot_payload = {
        "snapshot_generated_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
        "source_kind": bundle.source_kind,
        "source_label": bundle.source_label,
        "source_file": bundle.source_file,
        "stats": {
            "normalized_code_count": len(bundle.all_codes),
            "a_share_code_count": len(bundle.a_share_codes),
            "selected_a_share_code_count": len(bundle.selected_a_share_codes),
            "non_a_code_count": len(bundle.non_a_codes),
            "invalid_row_count": len(bundle.invalid_rows),
        },
        "all_codes": bundle.all_codes,
        "a_share_codes": bundle.a_share_codes,
        "selected_a_share_codes": bundle.selected_a_share_codes,
        "non_a_codes": bundle.non_a_codes,
        "invalid_rows": bundle.invalid_rows,

def init_run_artifacts(output_dir: Path, report_prefix: str, run_id: str) -> RunArtifacts:
    run_dir = output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_runs" / run_id
    run_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    return RunArtifacts(
        run_id=run_id,
        run_dir=run_dir,
        input_snapshot_json=run_dir / "input_snapshot.json",
        input_snapshot_csv=run_dir / "input_snapshot.csv",
        report_md=run_dir / "report.md",
        summary_json=run_dir / "summary.json",
        run_summary_txt=run_dir / "run_summary.txt",
        legacy_report_md=output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_{run_id}.md",
        legacy_summary_json=output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_{run_id}.json",
        latest_report_md=output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_latest.md",
        latest_summary_json=output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_latest_summary.json",
        latest_run_summary_txt=output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_latest_run_summary.txt",
        latest_input_snapshot_json=output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_latest_input_snapshot.json",
        latest_input_snapshot_csv=output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_latest_input_snapshot.csv",
    )



def write_input_snapshots(bundle: InputBundle, artifacts: RunArtifacts) -> None:
    selected_set = set(bundle.selected_a_share_codes)
    snapshot_payload = {
        "snapshot_generated_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
        "source_kind": bundle.source_kind,
        "source_label": bundle.source_label,
        "source_file": bundle.source_file,
        "stats": {
            "normalized_code_count": len(bundle.all_codes),
            "a_share_code_count": len(bundle.a_share_codes),
            "selected_a_share_code_count": len(bundle.selected_a_share_codes),
            "non_a_code_count": len(bundle.non_a_codes),
            "invalid_row_count": len(bundle.invalid_rows),
        },
        "all_codes": bundle.all_codes,
        "a_share_codes": bundle.a_share_codes,
        "selected_a_share_codes": bundle.selected_a_share_codes,
        "non_a_codes": bundle.non_a_codes,
        "invalid_rows": bundle.invalid_rows,
        "rows": [
            {
                **row,
                "selected_for_a_share_report": str(row.get("normalized_code") or "") in selected_set,
            }
            for row in bundle.rows
        ],
    }
    artifacts.input_snapshot_json.write_text(
        json.dumps(snapshot_payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )

    with artifacts.input_snapshot_csv.open("w", encoding="utf-8", newline="") as handle:
        writer = csv.DictWriter(
            handle,
            fieldnames=[
                "row_index",
                "raw_code",
                "normalized_code",
                "classification",
                "selected_for_a_share_report",
                "source_kind",
                "source_file",
            ],
        )
        writer.writeheader()
        for row in bundle.rows:
            writer.writerow(
                {
                    "row_index": row.get("row_index"),
                    "raw_code": row.get("raw_code"),
                    "normalized_code": row.get("normalized_code") or "",
                    "classification": row.get("classification"),
                    "selected_for_a_share_report": str(row.get("normalized_code") or "") in selected_set,
                    "source_kind": bundle.source_kind,

**Exploring message functionality**

I'm considering whether the wrapper can send messages by using `--push-feishu --target-user ...`. The push function currently only sends messages and images, which is okay for now. After improving the message builder, I think the text will become more formal. I’m curious if I should also attach an image or include a path to the MD/summary in the message. I should think about generating a preview artifact file for the message too.

**Evaluating file patching options**

I'm considering how to patch run_fusion_report.py effectively. I think reading the whole file and making edits programmatically could be easier, especially with Python. While I could use an edit tool for multiple edits, maybe using Python via exec is safer for complex modifications. Since the file is external, I should use the absolute path with the edit tool but also need to read specific chunks to patch correctly. Balancing safety with effectiveness is key here!

**Planning script modifications**

I'm thinking about how to edit the script using separate blocks. First, I need to check the imports; it looks like I won't need new ones aside from possibly textwrap. My focus will be on modifying functions like RunArtifacts and the push section. I wonder if we can simplify the process by avoiding the generation of a complex preview artifact file and instead writing to a summary JSON field. However, including a `_latest_feishu_message.txt` could provide more tangibility. I'll proceed carefully with these adjustments!

808:def build_run_summary_text(summary: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
            "|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|",
        ]
        for row in valid_flow_rows:
            lines.append(
                f"| {row.get('code')} | {row.get('date')} | {row.get('close')} | {row.get('pct')} | {row.get('main_inflow')} | {row.get('main_inflow_ratio')} |"
            )
    else:
        lines.append("- 暂无可用资金流数据（网络/接口限制）。")
    if failed_flow_rows:
        lines.append("")
        lines.append("### Flow Errors")
        for row in failed_flow_rows[:10]:
            lines.append(f"- {row.get('code')}: `{row.get('error')}`")

    lines += [
        "",
        "## Stable Artifacts",
        f"- Summary JSON: `{artifacts.get('summary_json', '-')}`",
        f"- Markdown report: `{artifacts.get('report_md', '-')}`",
        f"- Run summary: `{artifacts.get('run_summary_txt', '-')}`",
        f"- Latest summary JSON: `{artifacts.get('latest_summary_json', '-')}`",
        f"- Latest markdown report: `{artifacts.get('latest_report_md', '-')}`",
        f"- Latest run summary: `{artifacts.get('latest_run_summary_txt', '-')}`",
    ]

def push_to_feishu(target_user: str, message: str, image_file: str = "") -> tuple[bool, str]:
    cmd = [
        "openclaw",
        "message",
        "send",
        "--channel",
        "feishu",
        "--account",
        "default",
        "--target",
        target_user,
        "-m",
        message,
    ]
    if image_file and Path(image_file).exists():
        cmd.extend(["--media", image_file])

    rc, out, err = run_cmd(cmd, timeout=90)
    info = (out.strip() or err.strip())[-1000:]
    return rc == 0, info

def _top_flow_opportunities(flow_rows: list[dict[str, Any]], limit: int = 3) -> list[str]:
    ranked: list[tuple[float, str]] = []
    for row in flow_rows:
        if row.get("error"):
            continue
        try:
            score = float(str(row.get("main_inflow_ratio") or "").replace("%", "").strip())
        except Exception:
            continue
        if score <= 0:
            continue
        ranked.append((score, f"{row.get('code')} 主力净占比 {row.get('main_inflow_ratio')} | 涨跌幅 {row.get('pct') or '-'}"))
    ranked.sort(key=lambda item: item[0], reverse=True)
    return [text for _, text in ranked[:limit]]



def _top_flow_risks(flow_rows: list[dict[str, Any]], limit: int = 3) -> list[str]:
    ranked: list[tuple[float, str]] = []
    for row in flow_rows:
        if row.get("error"):
            ranked.append((9999.0, f"{row.get('code')} 资金流获取失败：{row.get('error')}"))
            continue
        try:
            score = float(str(row.get("main_inflow_ratio") or "").replace("%", "").strip())
        except Exception:
            continue
        if score >= 0:
            continue
        ranked.append((abs(score), f"{row.get('code')} 主力净占比 {row.get('main_inflow_ratio')} | 涨跌幅 {row.get('pct') or '-'}"))
    ranked.sort(key=lambda item: item[0], reverse=True)
    return [text for _, text in ranked[:limit]]



def build_feishu_message(summary: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
    input_info = summary.get("input", {}) or {}
    stock_daily = summary.get("stock_daily", {}) or {}
    artifacts = summary.get("artifacts", {}) or {}
    flow_rows = summary.get("akshare_flow_rows", []) or []

    source_kind = input_info.get("source_kind") or "-"
    source_label = input_info.get("source_label") or "-"
    holdings_count = input_info.get("normalized_code_count", 0)
    a_share_count = input_info.get("selected_a_share_code_count", 0)
    degraded = summary.get("degraded_reasons") or []
    opportunity_lines = _top_flow_opportunities(flow_rows)
    risk_lines = _top_flow_risks(flow_rows)

    if not opportunity_lines:
        opportunity_lines = ["主链已稳定切到 web source，可直接以 latest 产物作为盘前依据。"]
    if not risk_lines:
        risk_lines = ["当前无系统降级；盘前仍需关注个股集合竞价与成交量确认。"]

    status_line = "✅ 组合状态：主链成功" if summary.get("status") == "SUCCESS" else f"⚠️ 组合状态：{summary.get('status')}"
    data_source_line = f"- 数据源：{source_label} / {source_kind}"
    if degraded:
        data_source_line += f" | 降级原因：{', '.join(degraded)}"
    else:
        data_source_line += " | 降级原因：无"

    lines = [
        f"📈 A股盘前日报｜{summary.get('generated_at')}",
        status_line,
        data_source_line,
        f"- 持仓数 / A股数：{holdings_count} / {a_share_count}",
        f"- 报告引擎：{'stock-daily-report 已生成图文' if stock_daily.get('ok') else 'stock-daily-report 异常，已由 watcher 兜底'}",
        "- 关键机会：",
    ]
    lines.extend([f"  • {item}" for item in opportunity_lines[:3]])
    lines.append("- 关键风险：")
    lines.extend([f"  • {item}" for item in risk_lines[:3]])
    lines.extend(
        [
            "- 主报告/图表：",
            f"  • Markdown：{artifacts.get('latest_report_md') or artifacts.get('report_md') or '-'}",
            f"  • Summary：{artifacts.get('latest_summary_json') or artifacts.get('summary_json') or '-'}",
            f"  • 图表：{stock_daily.get('image_file') or '-'}",
            f"  • HTML：{stock_daily.get('html_file') or '-'}",
        ]
    )
    return "\n".join(lines)



def build_markdown(summary: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
